ats_utilities.config_io.processor.yaml_processor module¶

Module

yaml_processor.py

Info

Defines class YAMLProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API to process configuration in YAML format. 1th level of configuration loader/storer implementation.

class ats_utilities.config_io.processor.yaml_processor.YAMLProcessor(scheme: Mapping[str, str] | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IConfigProcessor

Defines class YAMLProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API to process configuration in YAML format. 1th level of configuration loader/storer implementation.

It defines:

attributes:
_data - Internal dict to store configuration data (default {}).
_scheme - Mapping with configuration scheme (default None).
methods:
__init__ - Initializes YAMLProcessor constructor.
deserialize - Loads and parses configuration from a raw source (string, stream, or lines).
serialize - Converts the internal configuration structure back to a formatted string representation.
update_data - Updates the internal configuration data and validates it against the scheme.
to_dict - Returns the parsed configuration as a flat or structured dictionary.
validate_by_scheme - Validates the internal parsed data structure against the provided scheme.
__str__ - Returns the YAMLProcessor instance as string representation.

Flat Format Config Scheme¶

Since this format is flat, there are no sections or parent elements. In the scheme mapping, the key represents the required parameter name, and the value must be an empty string ("").

scheme = {
    "hostname": "",
    "port": "",
    "verbose": ""
}
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_data: dict[str, str]¶
_scheme: Mapping[str, str] | None¶
deserialize(content: Any) → bool[source]¶

Loads and parses configuration from a raw source (string, stream, or lines).

Parameters:

content (<Any>) – Raw configuration data (str, stream, or sequence).

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

Converts the internal configuration structure back to a formatted string representation.

Returns:

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.

Returns the parsed configuration as a flat or structured dictionary.

Returns:

Dictionary with configuration information.

Return type:

<dict[str, str]>

Exceptions:

None.

update_data(new_data: Mapping[str, str]) → bool[source]¶

Updates the internal configuration data and validates it against the scheme.

Parameters:

new_data (<Mapping[str, str]>) – Mapping containing configuration keys and values.

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

validate_by_scheme() → bool[source]¶

Validates the internal parsed data structure against the provided scheme.

Returns:

<True> if data matches the scheme, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
